headline: Xiaomi's MIMO hits all-time high; Tencent's free tier vanishes
summary: Xiaomi/mimo-v2.5-20260422 just set an all-time token-share record at 17.6%, climbing 1.9 percentage points in a single day. Meanwhile, Tencent's former #1 model (hy3-20260706:free) dropped entirely from the rankings after commanding 20.8% share, replaced by a paid variant now sitting at #3 with 7.1%. DeepSeek holds steady at #2 (10.2%), while Anthropic vaults into the top 10 with claude-4.8-opus jumping 3 ranks to #7.
highlights: Xiaomi now owns 18.7% of all tokens across the platform—up 2.0% in one day
Tencent's free tier exit reshuffles the board: paid hy3 debuts at #3 (7.1%), but provider share plummets 13.7% overnight
StepFun's step-3.7-flash rockets 6 ranks to #9 (+2.2% share in 24h); xAI's grok-4.5 jumps 8 spots to #23
OpenAI's gpt-5.4 surges 13 ranks to #24 on a single day (+0.5% share); gpt-5.5 slides to #22 (-0.1%)
Five new entrants: Tencent's paid model, OpenAI's gpt-5.2, Poolside's laguna-s-2.1, InclusionAI's ling-2.6, and Qwen's qwen3.7-plus
Five dropouts including Qwen's qwen3.7-max and Google's gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview
